title: wedelia tenuicaulis
intro: Wedelia tenuicaulis, also known as creeping wedelia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Wedelia tenuicaulis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
